hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && INPUT=$(cat) && if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi && cargo test 2>&1 || { echo 'cargo test failed' >&2; exit 2; }

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && INPUT=$(cat) && if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi && cargo clippy -- -D warnings 2>&1 || { echo 'cargo clippy found warnings' >&2; exit 2; }
